channel.title: Asset Hierarchy on DefectDojo Documentation
channel.description: Recent content in Asset Hierarchy on DefectDojo Documentation

item.title: Asset Hierarchy
item.description:
DefectDojo Pro is extending the Product/Product Type object classes to provide greater flexibility with the data model.

Currently, this feature is in Beta.

item.title: Assign Priority, Risk and SLAs
item.description: Effective risk-based vulnerability management requires an approach that considers both business context and technical exploitability. Using DefectDojo Pro’s Priority and Risk feature, users can automatically sort Findings into a meaningful context, ensuring high-impact vulnerabilities can be addressed first.

item.title: Product Health Grade
item.description: DefectDojo can calculate a grade for your Products based on the amount of Findings contained within. Grades are ranked from A - F.
